title: 朝日杯FSの後に・楽しんだ横で

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Maruzensky, accelerating at full throttle, enjoys
the race and finishes with a good result.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Riding high on her accomplishment, she decides
to take another step toward the Classics by
running in the Spring Stakes.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
While Maruzensky has been enjoying her races
with all of her heart...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her incredible running has become like an
insurmountable wall in the eyes of other racers.
